review_title: Peace of Mind with ProofPoint Essentials
description: My overall experience is very good. The software simply does what it promises to do very well. We use it for email protection.
author: Matt K.
pros: ProofPoint Essentials provides a complete line of email protection tools, such as simple spam protection, phishing protection, URL and attachment sandboxing, encryption, emergency inbox and archival. It is extremely effective and very little malicious email gets through. The daily digest reassures end users that they are not missing important emails.
cons: The setup is a bit complex and requires at least one hour per installation, with MX record changes, transport rules, and setting up the profile. The provided PowerShell scripts for Office 365 help, but it still takes longer than I would like.

description: Good overall product; sometimes difficult to configure / customize, but surely one of the best in terms of update and protection.
author: Ilario M.
pros: Easy integration with Outlook 365, friendly management console
cons: Difficult sometimes to customize or send request for mail analysies

author: Wasif T.
pros: Nothing. The good thing would be protection.
cons: too many notifications, for everything. It's annoying

author: Abhijeet J.
pros: Provides superior spam and junk mail protection compared to the competition including default filters of M365 and Google Workspace emails.
cons: Priced a bit higher than other products and require IT expertise for DNS changes.

review_title: Great first layer of email protection
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: User training and preventing accidental clicks is difficult. The filtering tools in Proofpoint do a great job at quarantining malicious messages from the user's inbox. The user may see the message in their quarantine digest, but the extra step to release it forces the user to think about the message before interacting with it.
cons: The reporting tools lack the ease of use we find with other tools. It seems like the development team has put all their efforts into building a security solid product, and reporting is only an after-thought.

review_title: PROOFPOINT , BETTER WAY TO PROTECT YOUR FORM FROM SPAMS AND PHISHING.
description: Ido like the power of the software to protect the endpoints from spam mails and phishing attack, but i recommend the UI to be little more user friendly.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Much better in terms of Spam detection and also link protection , It will scan any links in our incoming mail and check whether it's genuine. Earlier we were using Trend micro email security and i find proof point much better in terms of spam detection and protecting the endpoints form clicking on unwanted links in the mails. Since its a cloud product the loading time of the interface may take some time , at times i find the UI very run responsive but that will not be a issue as it will be temporary for some minutes
cons: I can't say it as a demerit but what i dislike the most with proof point is that for quarantined mails bulk delete option is shown and sometimes some bulk mails getting listed in the quarantined folder needs to be deleted one by one. like if am getting multiple spam mails from a single mail id i should be given the option to deleted the same . But for our convenience they have given an option to hide those types.

review_title: Very good for email protection, though bit pricey
description: After setup with the help of professional services, we only occasionally tuned the software ourselves now. We are a multi-entity organization and Proofpoint supports having "suborgs" for this.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: From the start Proofpoint Email Protection has done a great job protecting our users from all email threats. It has done a better job then our previous software. The support is good and fairly quick. I also did an Instructor Led Training Course and the trainer was very good. Online training options are also available as part of the Proofpoint Level Up site.
cons: There are some minor issues: the GUI is a bit dated (but very functional). From what I understand a major rework is being planned but no date yet. Also the False Positive/Negative reporting can be more streamlined.

description: Proofpoint email protection has overall done its job for us. Its advanced email fraud protection has significantly minimized the amount of phishing emails that come through and it's proven to be a very reliable source of security.
author: Alanna O.
pros: Excellent threat detection, great policy controls, imposter email protection, very effective at blocking phishing, malware, ransomware, etc.
cons: there were some user interface challenges that made navigation and task execution a little less efficient.

review_title: Robust Email Security with Advanced Threat Protection
author: Kiran R.
pros: Proofpoint's Email protection is excellent in identifying and blocking phishing attacks. It's Advanced Threat detection is big Pro. URL and Attachment analysis is real time and efficient. Reduces spam and huge plus for our organisation. Policy customisation and integration with other tools are great features.
cons: Quarantine interface is bit complex to use and manage. I find nothing other than that at this point.

description: We love the product it's definitely the industry gold standard for email security
author: Alex K.
pros: Very robust interface with granular controls
cons: Classic admin panel is a little complicated

author: Akram S.
pros: Multiple modules from a centralized location. We rely on PPF for our org's email protection including TAP/TRAP/ spoofing and spam protection.
cons: Unresponsiveness of technical support: we had experiences where the technical support is not as responsive as we would expect. When opening P1 tickets from the business's standpoint, PP's support would request to reduce the priority .

description: Proofpoint Email Protection has allowed us to increase our email marketing reach without the fear of breaches to our data and security
author: Adam H.
pros: What I like best about Proofpoint Email Protection is that fact that it is always working behind the scenes to protect us and that provides a lot of peace of mind!
cons: Sometimes Proofpoint works a little too hard and we have to "dial things down a bit"., otherwise Fantastic!

review_title: Some glaring holes in primary faetures
description: So far we are on the fence if we will continue using this product across our many users. The security shortcoming could have dire consequences along with liability concerns.
author: Seth K.
pros: On the basic level it does what it is supposed to which is filter email threats and utilize a portal for secure, encrypted email processing.
cons: The encryption module has a lot to be desired. The largest glaring hole we found is when sending an encrypted email via the Outlook plugin, any subsequent reply to the conversation will go out unencrypted unless the original sender remembers to hit the "Send Securely" button on every single reply. If this is forgotten once, then the entire conversation is sent out in the open which breaks all levels of security & compliance. When a user utilizes the subject trigger, this is not an issue, however users cannot be expected to remember these small nuances & shortcomings (plus most want to use the simple "Send Securely" button). If you are going to create a plugin, make sure it covers ALL bases. Possibly have the plugin insert it's own subject in order to trigger conversation replies.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It was fine if that was the only option but other less obvious to the user solutions would be my preference
author: Danika T.
pros: Even though it was extra steps to get what I needed to done, it was straightforward after you had used it a while.
cons: It seemed like there were a too many extra steps to be able to complete easy daily tasks like checking an email.

description: This helps protects our sensitive data. The user interface is simple to use.
author: Ryan M.
pros: I like most that this protects all of your emails. The user experience is very good. The message is clear and easy to read.
cons: What is the most frustrating about this software is that once you view a message, you cannot go back to see the general inbox. You have to find the message you want and reopen the program.

description: Overall, the experience with Proofpoint was wonderful.
author: Bryson S.
pros: I thought that Proofpoint was a more than adequate email protection software.
cons: Some areas of Proofpoint proved to be a bit difficult to customize for our organization.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Proofpoint is one of the best products I have used for Email security
description: My email security was so well handled, I decided to try proofpoint secure email which my users absolutely loved. I now check the proofpoint products first if I need any other type of product.
author: Tony S.
pros: There are many option for personalizing the amount of protection you get. I have yet to find something I could not block by tweaking the settings. Support is also very helpful in this regard.
cons: Until you have used the controls for some time, it can seem overwhelming

author: Clayton M.
pros: Obviously the big thing is it filters out unwanted emails from coming into my inbox. It is a must have sort of tool in any business enviornment.
cons: I think it can be tricky to release the emails sometimes. I can usually figure it out, but sometimes it can take a minute.

review_title: Enterprise Level Email Protection and Filtering.
description: The prior product was no longer supported, and we were the victim of an email-based target.
author: Adam D.
pros: Quick setup. Well regarded in the industry. Is actually very good at what it does.
cons: Too many admin options, where one system can't set all the options. There is some overlap, and some missing features in each of the admin sections.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very advanced cyber defense / anti-virus antimalware
author: Soon kit T.
pros: Very advanced threat defense system. all-rounder cyber security tool
cons: The configuration is too advanced for average user. Training is needed to ensure user make use of the features well to improve security.

author: Leo L.
pros: Not just a simple ESG solution. Proofpoint also provides Targeted Attack Protection which protects those very-attacked-person like CEO, management persons. Proofpoint also provides training to educate the end-users on email awareness. Not hard or complicated to use, the email filtering and threat protection works very well. We are able to track the filtered emails and caught threat very easily.
cons: Price is quite top notch but you get what you pay.

author: Chris H.
pros: I liked the amount of features and that it could also do link protection in emails. The interface was typically fairly quick.
cons: Sometimes it was difficult to get legit senders and emails to be allowed through. We would get lots of complaints from clients about mail being blocked, senders being blocked, etc. even though we went though the proper steps of allowing them through the spam filter.

review_title: Good filter, not sure 'bout the digest report
description: We keep using proofpoint to keep our mail inbox clean and safe
author: Francisco Javier R.
pros: Proofpoint keeps my inbox clean, that's certain and you can also create a rule to get rid of those annoyng providers and many other features. It's customizable so you can manage what you consider spam.
cons: Once a rule was automatically created an all the comunication with one of our customer's domain was rejected, thus we almost had a sever incident with them but we managed to notice the problem and solve it on time

review_title: Improving Email Security The Easy Way
author: Lucia M.
pros: With this amazing product, dealing with threats is easy thanks to threat intelligence features.
cons: No bad experiences with the email security solution.

review_title: A robust filter for potential threatening emails
description: Proofpoint filters through my emails at all times to make sure I am receiving emails that are priority emails, and hides away irrelevant emails that can be marked as promotional or spam and puts them into quarantine. At a certain point in the day, I get an email notifying me which emails were filtered out, so I can allow them to release the emails or mark something as not spam.
author: Carrie H.
pros: Proofpoint filters through my emails and catches emails that are not marked as spam or junk, but are irrelevant from my daily functioning needs. It is an email filter that takes email protection one step further.
cons: Sometimes it filters out emails that are not spam, and I have to wait until Proofpoint informs me that it has emails in quarantine to be able to access those emails.
